April 22, 2026 · Latest Headlines
🏆 Guzzo Storms to the Top After Round 2
Giovanni Guzzo shot a blistering 39 Stableford points in Round 2 to claim the Season Standings lead with a two-round total of 75 points.
⚡ Atkinson Climbs 18 Spots in One Round
Ken Atkinson posted the highest score of the week — 42 Stableford points — rocketing from 25th to 7th in the season standings, the biggest single-round jump of 2026.
📉 Collier Falls Three Places Despite Strong Year
Dean Collier slipped from 2nd to 5th after a tough Round 2 score of just 27 points, but his 41-point opener still keeps him well within striking distance of the leaders.
